root.name: Cargo Magnate NI
护卫舱海富豪
root.description: Stored in a battleship's frigate escape bay for maximum ammo capacity
放在战列的护卫逃生舱，能最大化装弹药

branch.fit: [Magnate Navy Issue] [low] Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II [med] Small Cargohold Optimization II Small Cargohold Optimization II Small Cargohold Optimization I
